title: Consultant Radiologist
summary: A leading healthcare organisation is seeking an experienced Consultant Radiologist to join its specialist clinical team in Dublin.
responsibilities: Work collaboratively with multidisciplinary clinical teams.
Support service development, governance and quality improvement.
requirements: Specialist registration or eligibility with the Irish Medical Council.
Eligibility to work in Ireland or willingness to complete the immigration process.

title: Finance Manager
summary: An established organisation is seeking a commercially focused Finance Manager to lead reporting, controls and strategic financial planning.
responsibilities: Lead budgeting, forecasting and management reporting.
Partner with senior leadership on commercial decisions.
requirements: Strong management reporting and commercial finance capability.

title: Project Engineer
summary: A project-led engineering business requires a Project Engineer to support delivery, coordination and technical compliance across active sites.
responsibilities: Coordinate project activities and technical documentation.
Liaise with clients, contractors and internal teams.
Monitor quality, safety and programme milestones.
requirements: Knowledge of Irish construction or engineering standards.
